title: helichrysum affine
intro: Helichrysum affine, also known as the Yellow Fever Plant, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa, belonging to the daisy family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, derived from its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Helichrysum affine include reducing inflammation and pain, improving wound healing, and providing relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including essential oils, extracts, and infusions, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
